# Stews 🍲 {-}

## Groundnut Stew {-}

From The Green Roasting Tin, Rukmini Iyer

<img src="images/groundnut-stew.png" width="200" alt="Cover image" align="right" style="margin: 0 1em 0 1em" />

- 1kg sweet potatoes peeled and cut into 1cm slices
- 1 onion
- 2 cloves garlic
- 1 chunk ginger
- 1 chilli
- 50g peanut butter
- 1 tin chopped tomatoes
- 400ml vegetable stock
- chopped coriander
- salted peanuts

Preheat oven to 180°C fan. Mix sweet potatoes, onion, garlic, ginger chilli in oil and salt in roasting tin. Cook for 45 mins. Mix peanut butter, tomatoes, stock, add and cook for 15 more minutes. Serve with rice.
